parameters.query:
select case when me.message_type = 0 then 'Usuario' else 'IA' end messagem_de, me.created_at, me."content"
  from public.messages me
  join (SELECT me.conversation_id, me.inbox_id, count(1) cont
		  from public.messages me
		 where me.message_type in ('0','1')
		 group by me.conversation_id, me.inbox_id) meo
    on me.conversation_id = meo.conversation_id
   and me.inbox_id = meo.inbox_id
  join conversations co 
    on me.conversation_id = co.id
  join contacts con
    on con.id = co.contact_id
  where (me."content"  is not null and me."content" <> '')
	and me.inbox_id in (35)
	and me.message_type in (0,1)
    and con.id = $1
    and co.display_id = $2
  order by me.id asc
